content: Three macOS-style terminal windows positioned in 3D space. Each panel typewriters its output in sequence while the camera drifts through — ideal for developer content, code walkthroughs, or technical product demos.
summary: A cinematic 3D terminal scene with typewriter output and spatial camera movement.
title: Terminal 3D

content: A full demonstration of the kinetica Transform3D API. Steps through chainable transforms, relative positioning, orbiting satellite elements, and quaternion SLERP interpolation — built to showcase what the 3D system can do in a single 20-second scene.
summary: A showcase of the Transform3D API with orbiting elements, SLERP interpolation, and composable matrix transforms.
title: Transform 3D Showcase
